title: KaeroMM Selection
description: This is my personal selection of mods to play with freinds in a vanilla+ style. This include performance mods for Fabric and some feature mods.
body:
This is my personal selection of Fabric mods to play with friends in a vanilla+ style. probably you don't need this selection if you are not playing on my private servers.

### What this specifically does or adds

This adds some Fabric performance mods for both client and server:
 * Sodium
 * Lithium
 * Indium
 * and more...

This add Iris to support shaders use

This adds a set of common mod libraries/add-ons:
 * Cloth Config
 * ModMenu
 * Reese's Sodium Options
 * and more...

This adds some feature and visual mods:
 * Journey Map
 * Plasmo Voice
 * Jade
 * Better Statistics Screen
 * Better Advancements
 * Better F3
 * and more...

This add a bunch of resource packs of [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

### Why you should want to download it
Probably only if you will play on my private servers.
